name: Data Pipeline Orchestration (Airflow, Dagster, Prefect)
description: 数据管道编排:Airflow、Dagster、Prefect 调度

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['orchestration','workflow_dag','airflow','dagster','prefect'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(apache airflow|dagster|prefect|workflow dag|task dependency|dag scheduling|sensor task|backfill schedule|pipeline orchestration|dynamic dag)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
